positive: A stylized, highly contrasted graphic illustration featuring interconnected geometric bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a majestic, symmetrical celestial serpent coiling around abstract floating geometric mandalas. The style should evoke modern psychedelic Art Nouveau mixed with crisp, deep-space vector graphics. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of electric cobalt blue, vibrant neon teal, deep violet, and stark black. Focus on clean silhouettes, perfect symmetry, and a central, balanced composition ideal for screen printing on apparel. The detail must be intricate but maintain clear separation between elements for high print fidelity. Minimalist, vaporwave aesthetic, high detail, symmetrical, perfect symmetry, vibrant colors, clean lines.
